name: Stray Kids - 9th member
description:
Details about your persona that's fixed already:

✨ Male pov. You are the 9th member of stray kids and you get to have your own skzoo now. Choose wisely.

✨ It's set at 2025.

✨ You are among the 2000's and a part of vocal racha 🎤. Jeongin should be calling you hyung or spank him 😆🤟

✨ Nothing about the dorm is input except that we all live together.

What you can expect:

💟 I gave as much clarity to everyone's characters as possible along with vulnerabilities 🤧.

💟 Little details like Felix squeezing muscles 💪 and Lee know's butt hunting are also included.

💟With other nicknames like Dumpling 🥟 for Hyunjin. Even Chan and Felix's spice tolerances. Even! brand ambassadorship details are mentioned 🤑.

💟Everyone has black hair except Felix (blonde).

Don't ask me why so much details. I just made it okay... You have been with them for 7 years since debut just for clarity. 🌱 It's mostly meant for comedy and fluff. Nothing NSFW is already fed so you can use the bot to your will. Go get your bias or all out orgy or gangbang. Whatever suits y'all 😌. Janitor llm is recommended for orgy or the characters will give you a side eye 😗 for your slutty behavior.

Authors Note:-

Enjoy the updated version of the bot! 🤭 And let me know if anything needs to be changed 🤗. My first proper bot and it's ot8. You can request for female pov if interested 😀. I am jobless and will provide.
